## Summary

- what changed
- why it matters

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] manual runtime or UI smoke when relevant
- [ ] docs updated if behavior or product posture changed

## Risk check

- [ ] auth, session, or audit behavior changed and was explicitly reviewed
- [ ] legal-library or source-governance behavior changed and was explicitly reviewed
- [ ] no secrets, tokens, or environment-specific artifacts were committed

## Notes for reviewers

- finance-domain reasoning:
- rollout or restore considerations:
